# CarolinaRiskâ„˘

## About
CarolinaRiskâ„˘ is an independent risk management advisory firm serving South Carolina.
We provide outsourced risk management oversight for businesses, non-profits, and
high-net-worth families. We are not a broker and not an agency â€” we sit on the
client's side of the table, free of commissions and carrier appointments.

## Services
- Enterprise-wide risk assessment and gap analysis for businesses and non-profits
- Broker and carrier oversight and renewal management
- Board-ready reporting and claims advocacy
- Personal risk review across property, liability, and life for families
- Coordination of advisors, carriers, and estate plans

## Location
South Carolina, United States
